verdict.rationale: Two rank-1 finance-pack tables both state Q2 2026 qualified pipeline actual at EUR 13.510M, matching the claim exactly; the sole dissent is a rank-8 narrative prose citing EUR 13.26M for the same Q2 2026 boundary, which the configured authority priority resolves in favor of the tables (the regional 13.053M is a narrower 'commercial' subset and does not compete).
verdict.suggested_action: Reconcile the Q2 2026 qualified pipeline discrepancy between the finance pack (EUR 13.51M) and the quarterly-update narrative (EUR 13.26M) before relying on the master figure, since the prose diverges from a pattern that held for the prior four quarters.

evidence.span_text: The qualified pipeline stood at EUR 13.26 million entering the next quarter.
